title: metastelma mucronatum
intro: Metastelma mucronatum, also known as the devil's climbing rope or climbing milkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metastelma mucronatum include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Metastelma mucronatum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures and ointments for topical application.
